raw_response:
```json
{
  "analysis_user_a": "User A presents a strong, principled argument for client-side processing, emphasizing improved user experience (UX) through faster UI response and reduced server/network load. Their argument is sound and well-aligned with modern web development best practices for interactive applications. However, without additional context, their argument remains at a high-level, lacking specific actionable steps, proof-of-concept ideas, or practical implementation details.",
  "analysis_user_b": "User B initially presents an identical, equally strong, principled argument for client-side processing, focusing on UX, speed, and efficiency. However, User B significantly strengthens their position through the Q&A context by providing a highly actionable, specific, and well-scoped proof-of-concept (POC). Their suggestion to load a static JSON of 500 bus stops and implement real-time client-side filtering clearly demonstrates how to achieve the stated benefits ('instant' feel) with minimal effort (1 afternoon, no backend changes). This practical demonstration capability shows a deeper understanding of implementation and problem-solving beyond just stating a principle.",
  "winner": "User B"
}
```

parsed_verdict.analysis_user_a: User A presents a strong, principled argument for client-side processing, emphasizing improved user experience (UX) through faster UI response and reduced server/network load. Their argument is sound and well-aligned with modern web development best practices for interactive applications. However, without additional context, their argument remains at a high-level, lacking specific actionable steps, proof-of-concept ideas, or practical implementation details.
parsed_verdict.analysis_user_b: User B initially presents an identical, equally strong, principled argument for client-side processing, focusing on UX, speed, and efficiency. However, User B significantly strengthens their position through the Q&A context by providing a highly actionable, specific, and well-scoped proof-of-concept (POC). Their suggestion to load a static JSON of 500 bus stops and implement real-time client-side filtering clearly demonstrates how to achieve the stated benefits ('instant' feel) with minimal effort (1 afternoon, no backend changes). This practical demonstration capability shows a deeper understanding of implementation and problem-solving beyond just stating a principle.

user_a_evidence: Bence karmaşık hesaplamaları ve veri filtreleme işlemlerini doğrudan cihaz üzerinde (Client-side) yapmalıyız. Bu sayede kullanıcı arayüzü çok daha hızlı tepki verir ve her işlem için sunucuya istek atıp internet trafiği yaratmamış oluruz. Kullanıcı deneyimi (UX) her şeyden önemlidir.
user_b_evidence: Bence karmaşık hesaplamaları ve veri filtreleme işlemlerini doğrudan cihaz üzerinde (Client-side) yapmalıyız. Bu sayede kullanıcı arayüzü çok daha hızlı tepki verir ve her işlem için sunucuya istek atıp internet trafiği yaratmamış oluruz. Kullanıcı deneyimi (UX) her şeyden önemlidir.
